name: Stewed Rabbit C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the rabbit pieces with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned rabbit in a removable liner.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the liner.
4. Place the liner in the base of the slow cooker.
5. Cover and cook on low for 7-8 hours.
6. Squirrel, woodchuck, or muskrat may be substituted - or an old cat, if you happen to have one handy.
